narrative:
Pleasant Township has 2,054 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
